violations.description: Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -Need hand soap at the hand wash sink.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Utensils need to be handle up.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. -No sneeze guard on the hot dog roller.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
